results.name: unauthenticated visitor to / is bounced to /login (root auth gate fires)
/forgot-password is reachable without a session (public route)
/invite/<bogus-token> returns 404 (no such pending invitation)
GET /api/auth/forgot returns 404 or 405 (handler is POST-only)
the deleted /api/payments/mock backdoor is no longer reachable
admin demo account signs in cleanly with correct credentials
after login, /api/auth/session returns id + role + schoolId + name + email
parent demo account signs in cleanly
student demo account signs in cleanly
teacher demo account signs in cleanly
accountant demo account signs in cleanly
HR manager demo account signs in cleanly
email with surrounding whitespace is normalised before lookup (still logs in)
email is trimmed AND lower-cased server-side (case-insensitive login)
mixed-case email logs in (server normalises to lower-case)
wrong password does NOT yield a session cookie
SQL-injection-style email payload is rejected (Prisma parameterises queries)
login POST with empty body must not return a session token
/api/auth/session without a cookie returns 200 with an empty body (NextAuth convention)
POST /api/auth/forgot for an UNKNOWN email returns ok:true (no account-existence oracle)
POST /api/auth/forgot for a real email creates an AuthToken row of type=PASSWORD_RESET
POST /api/auth/forgot with a syntactically-invalid email returns 400
POST /api/auth/reset with an unknown token returns 400 invalid-token (no DB write)
POST /api/auth/reset with a password shorter than 8 chars returns 400 weak-password
unauthenticated GET /audit redirects to /login?next=/audit (auth gate fires before role gate)
a STUDENT navigating directly to /audit is redirected to / (admin-only role gate)
a PARENT navigating directly to /payroll is redirected to / (HR-roles-only gate)
a TEACHER navigating directly to /people is redirected to / (admin/HR-only gate)
a TEACHER navigating directly to /Home/HR is redirected to / (HR-only dashboard)
a TEACHER navigating directly to /Home/Admissions is redirected to / (admin-only dashboard)
an ACCOUNTANT navigating directly to /audit is redirected to / (audit log is admin/principal-only)
ADMIN can reach /audit (200), confirming the role gate allows the right role through
ACCOUNTANT can reach /payroll (200), confirming finance roles see payroll
HR_MANAGER can reach /people (200), confirming HR sees the directory
a STUDENT calling /api/tax/24q/.../text gets 401/403 (HR/Finance-only export, no PII leak)
a STUDENT calling /api/tax/epf/.../ecr gets 401/403 (HR/Finance-only)
a STUDENT calling /api/tax/26q/.../text gets 401/403 (HR/Finance-only vendor TDS)
Razorpay webhook without an X-Razorpay-Signature header returns 401 (HMAC-required)
Razorpay webhook with a malformed/wrong signature returns 401 (timingSafeEqual length-checked safely)
webhook unknown event ignored
client-side payment-verify endpoint rejects mismatched razorpay_signature with 401
after 5 wrong-password attempts on the same account, lockedUntil is set and login is blocked
every Prisma migration row in _prisma_migrations has applied_steps_count=1 and finished_at set
every Student.userId points to a real User row (no foreign-key orphans)
no Invoice.total/amountPaid or Payment.amount is negative (sanity check on money columns)
no LeaveBalance.used row is negative (sanity check on counters)
every sha256 token hash in AuthToken is unique — no replay-able duplicates
GET /api/tax/24q/.../text as ADMIN returns text/plain starting with the Vidyalaya header line
GET /api/tax/24q for a quarter with NO payslip data returns just the header (200, not 500)
GET /api/tax/24q with non-numeric fy returns 400 (not a 500 server error)
PARENT POSTs /api/payments/razorpay for own-child invoice → 200 with provider=razorpay + orderId
student → other student's invoice → 403/404
unauthenticated POST to any /api/ai/* endpoint is rejected (401/302)
TEACHER POST to /api/ai/essay-grade returns a non-empty AI response (confirms OPENAI_API_KEY wired)
POST /api/transport/ping with a wrong driverToken is rejected with 403 forbidden
POST /api/transport/ping without busId/token returns 400 missing-auth
POST /api/transport/ping with lat=999/lng=999 returns 400 bad-coords (range-checked)
POST /api/digest without any secret header returns 401 (refuses to send mass mail)
POST /api/digest with the WRONG X-Digest-Token still returns 401 (constant-time string equality)
digest valid secret
/favicon.ico is reachable without a session (public asset)
POST /api/payments/razorpay without a session is 401 or 302→/login (auth-gated order creation)
GET /api/fees/<path-traversal-string>/pdf does NOT serve a file (Prisma findUnique-by-id makes traversal irrelevant)
under 10 concurrent failed-login threads, the counter still reaches MAX and lockedUntil is set (race-free)
warm cache /login TTFB stays under 3s (perf smoke against Vercel edge)
production /login response carries Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS pin)
NextAuth-set cookies are HttpOnly AND Secure (browser cannot read them via JS, only sent over HTTPS)
NextAuth cookies declare a SameSite policy (CSRF defence)
ADMIN sidebar has /audit link
results.reason: client-component nav — covered by Playwright TC-303 family

results.name: a STUDENT's home page does NOT mention admin-only labels (Audit log, Payroll) — verified via SSR HTML scan
a PARENT's home page mentions Fees and Transport (parent-relevant nav surfaces)
/login returns a real Next.js HTML shell (DOCTYPE, <html>, viewport, _next assets)
demo-account grid visibility is controlled by NEXT_PUBLIC_SHOW_DEMO_ACCOUNTS env var (informational; either is acceptable)
webhook is idempotent on replay
Form 24Q gross totals equal SUM(Payslip.gross) for the same quarter — financial accuracy check
deactivated user (User.active = false) cannot start a new session — soft-delete enforced
MessageOutbox rows only have valid channel + status enum values — no orphan states
/api/auth/forgot response time differs by <1.5s between known and unknown emails (no timing-side-channel for account enumeration)
